name_cn:
Kelly elan Grey Elephant · Gold
Imported cowhide, cross-grain, hand-waxed thread, full steel hardware
Removable shoulder strap, 2 carrying styles: handbag and underarm bag. Great capacity, super comfortable to carry!!
Dimensions: 27x15x5
